examples: A steel railway bridge spans the yalu river.
The freshwater goby is mainly found in Liao River and Yalu River in Liaoning.
The river-sea dividing marker must be a symbol which separates the Yalu river from the Yellow sea.
At high tide on the Yalu, you can almost get within arm's reach of North Korea.
Hwanggumpyong is a sandy island at the mouth of the Yalu river that divides North Korea from China.
